channel.title: API on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in API on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Assign issues to Copilot using the API
item.description:
GitHub added the ability to assign issues to Copilot via both the GraphQL and REST APIs, with options to set the target repository and base branch and to provide custom instructions and custom agents for how Copilot should handle the issue.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: LLM Speech in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry announces a public preview of LLM Speech, an API that applies large language model capabilities to speech tasks—providing fluent, context-aware transcription and translation with expanded multilingual support and advanced prompt tuning.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Fine-grain permissions for Copilot usage metrics now available
item.description:
GitHub added a fine-grain enterprise role—“View enterprise Copilot metrics”—that grants access to the Copilot Usage Metrics APIs and the Copilot Usage Dashboard so assigned users can view enterprise-level Copilot usage data.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GraphQL Explorer removal from API documentation on November 7, 2025
item.description:
On November 7, 2025 GitHub retired the GraphQL Explorer from its API documentation. The change, following a prior announcement, affects a small number of users who used the Explorer to experiment with the GitHub GraphQL API.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Manage budgets and track usage with new billing API updates
item.description:
GitHub expanded its billing APIs to let organizations programmatically manage budgets, track usage, and retrieve cost center data so finance and engineering teams can automate cost controls and reporting.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot usage metrics dashboard and API in public preview
item.description:
GitHub announced that a Copilot usage metrics dashboard and a corresponding API are available in public preview for GitHub Enterprise, allowing organizations to view and programmatically access Copilot usage metrics.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Product-specific billing APIs are closing down
item.description:
GitHub is closing down the remaining product-specific billing APIs for Actions, Packages, and shared storage, following earlier notices about Actions workflow usage endpoints.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: k8s: Kubernetes v1.34: Recovery From Volume Expansion Failure (GA)
item.description: Kubernetes v1.34 graduates automated recovery from failed persistent volume expansions to GA. Users can correct an over-sized PersistentVolumeClaim (PVC) by reducing the requested size (as long as the new request is still larger than the PV’s original capacity) without cluster-admin intervention; consumed quota from a failed expansion is returned automatically. The release also introduces improved observability and error reporting for expansion operations, retries with reduced request rates, and several resizing workflow bug fixes.

item.title: github: A REST API for GitHub Projects, sub-issues improvements, and more
item.description:
GitHub announced a REST API for GitHub Projects so developers can read and manage project data programmatically, plus enhancements to sub-issues to make breaking down work easier and other related improvements.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GraphQL API resource limits
item.description:
GitHub is introducing new resource consumption limits to its GraphQL API to maintain infrastructure stability and dependability.

  • Source: GitHub
